ksa_text: Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations that produce reliable, reusable datasets for analytics consumers.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-002 (TF, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4199 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (onet=0.420, nice=0.402, dcwf=0.397) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: TF domain KSA TF-S-002 excluded at composite 0.4199, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4199 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4199 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a TF (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Citizen Data Scientist. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. TF KSA with composite 0.4199 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-S-002 (TF, composite 0.4199) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4199 with signal across onet=0.420, nice=0.402, dcwf=0.397 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from TF-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4199, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
